title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers presents five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agent systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardians as Python code guardrails, and runtime guardrails for self-correction. The demo uses a travel agent built with Strands Agents framework, with production examples using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore.
